Best-effort OpenAPI 3.1 description of the Flexport REST API v2.
Derived from the public developer documentation at https://apidocs.flexport.com/.
Covers a representative subset of the v2 resource model: shipments, bookings,
purchase orders, customs, documents, network entities, and webhooks. JSON
request and response bodies use Flexport's standard envelope (`data`, `meta`,
`errors`); operation-specific schemas are not modeled here.


Contact Support:
 Name: Flexport
